name: word-count
title: Word Count
summary: A tiny code skill: counts words, characters, and lines in text. Runs sandboxed with every capability denied.
description: Demonstrates Phase 1 sandboxed execution of a kind:code skill. Reads a JSON {text} on stdin, writes {words, chars, lines, avg_word_len} on stdout. Needs no network, filesystem, shell, or secrets.
author: Warden Curated Pack
